---
id: provider-controller-configure
title: "Configure a provider for an organization"
description: "Creates or updates an organization's provider configuration. Use this endpoint to enable or disable a provider, set custom OAuth scopes, or supply organization-managed OAuth credentials."
sidebar_label: "Configure a provider for an organization"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Configure a provider for an organization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/organizations/{organizationId}/data_integration_configurations/{slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates or updates an organization's provider configuration. Use this endpoint to enable or disable a provider, set custom OAuth scopes, or supply organization-managed OAuth credentials.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

>
